face.structure: heart-shaped, with a gently pointed chin and high cheekbones

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with a slightly upward tilt
eyes.color: dark brown with flecks of gold
details: thin black eyeliner accentuating the sharpness
subtle highlights reflecting light at the bottom edges

face.expression: thoughtful, with a hint of skepticism

skin.rendering_notes: subtle soft shading around the jawline and temples

hair.style: long and straight with softly layered ends
hair.flow: tucked neatly behind ears, with occasional loose strands
details: light reflects in straight strands giving it a slight glossiness
subtle movement implying a gentle breeze

character.aura: a quiet intensity, with an undercurrent of strategic awareness

outfit.design: minimalistic with a pattern of subtle diagonal pinstripes
details: silver cufflinks shaped like chess pieces
no visible accessories other than a simple silver chain bracelet

composition.framing: mid-length, focusing on the upper torso
composition.pose: leaning slightly forward as if engaging in conversation
composition.gesture: right hand resting on chin, left hand holding a pen

background.color_palette: cool blues and grays with hints of silver
background.details: faint geometric shapes to suggest a modern, strategic environment without clutter
background.rules: background should not draw focus away from character
